title: Invisible Item Frames
description: Craft Invisible Item Frames and Invisible Glow Item Frames with phantom membranes
body:
The Resource Pack is **optional** and provides a custom icon for invisible item frames in the inventory.
##

This data pack allows you to craft Invisible Item Frames and Invisible Glow Item Frames with phantom membranes. When no item is placed inside, they look like normal item frames but emit subtle particles to differentiate them, meaning you don't have to worry about forgetting where you put them.
